title: chrysanthemum coronatum
intro: Chrysanthemum coronatum, also known as the crown daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. Chrysanthemum coronatum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried flowers, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
